name: co-rar
description: CO-RAR — Continuous Resilient Adversarial Reasoning in Codeless Design. A frame for designing and critiquing systems where reasoning lives inside execution, an adversary or moving target exists, and the system is expected to mutate under pressure rather than break. Provides a task diagnostic (N/S/A conditions), seven design principles (P1-P7), operational metrics, and reference playbooks for feedback loops, adversarial critics, and mutation stratification.
